name: Stuffed Fillets of Sole with Mushroom Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly butter a shallow, heat-resistant, non-metallic baking dish. Place the stuffed-sole fillets in the baking dish. Sprinkle with salt and pepper to taste.
2. Sprinkle onions over fish fillets and pour wine over fish. Cover with clear plastic wrap and heat in Microwave Oven for 7 to 8 minutes or until the fish flakes easily with a fork. Baste the fish with wine and onions several times during cooking. Set poached fish aside.
3. In a medium-sized, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl, melt 1/3 cup butter or margarine in Microwave Oven for 45 seconds. Add mushroom slices and heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 2 minutes.
4. Blend in flour until smooth. Gradually add cream, stirring until smooth. Return sauce to Microwave Oven and heat, uncovered, for 4 to 5 minutes or until the mixture is thickened and smooth. Stir occasionally.
5. Add 1/2 cup fish liquid from the baking dish to mushroom sauce and stir until well blended.
6. Place fish fillets on a heat-resistant, non-metallic serving platter. Spoon mushroom sauce over fish. Cover and heat in Microwave Oven for 2 to 3 minutes or until heated through. Sprinkle with paprika just before serving.
